title: sideritis hirsuta subsp. endressii
intro: Sideritis hirsuta subsp. endressii, commonly known as mountain tea or Greek mountain tea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sideritis hirsuta subsp. endressii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Sideritis hirsuta subsp. endressii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
